# netbox_available_prefix (Resource)

Allocates the next available prefix of the given prefix length from a parent prefix.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `parent_prefix_id` (Number) The ID of the parent prefix to allocate the new prefix from.
- `prefix_length` (Number) The prefix length (e.g. 24 for a /24) of the new prefix to allocate.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description for the prefix.
- `status` (String) The status of the prefix (e.g., active, reserved).

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the allocated prefix.
- `prefix` (String) The allocated prefix in CIDR notation (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24).
